docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $481.14 FILED BY WALL MEDICAL GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT CARAANG, LIEZELE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
